prompt:
Game: Light Warrior.
Asset ID: weapon.thunder_hammer.
Thunder Hammer weapon concept sheet for a UE5 third-person arena game. Sacred luminous hammer made of electrum, pale stone, gold inlays, dawn-blue lightning core, etheric resonance coils, strong simple silhouette for gameplay readability. Include front view, side view, head detail, grip detail, impact shockwave thumbnail, and gameplay camera thumbnail.
Global style rules: No text, logo, watermark, UI labels, or decorative frame inside generated images. Prioritize UE5 third-person gameplay readability over decorative micro-detail. Use the game world's reality: luminous guardian power, living darkness, sacred technology, resonance, etheric force, Tartaria-inspired restored architecture, and flat huge-world horizon logic. Hero reads as white-gold and dawn-blue. Enemies read as violet-black with red-violet danger tells. Restoration reads as warm gold and dawn-blue. Every output is a candidate until proven in a UE5 gameplay capture.
Avoid: text, letters, logo, watermark, tiny unreadable filigree, grimdark mud, realistic gore, generic steel warhammer, cluttered background.
review_gate: Hammer silhouette must read as the player's primary weapon during movement and strike effects.
